headline: Lululemon Governance Reset Tests Board Changes Against Slumping Share Performance
summary: Lululemon athletica (NasdaqGS:LULU) has settled its proxy dispute with founder Chip Wilson. The company is adding two new independent directors, marketer Laura Gentile and retail executive Marc Maurer. The board plans to recruit an additional director with apparel industry experience and is proposing annual board elections. Lululemon athletica enters this governance reset with its share price at $117.55 and the stock down 11.0% over the past week and 10.4% over the past month. Returns are...
